calendar.matters:
Petition By Trust Beneficiaries R. Madison Ahd G.R. Madison For Accounting, For Surcharge Of Trustees, And For Removal Of Trustees.
Off Calendar May-14-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Amanda Ebey for Petitoner.

Ms. Ebey stated that her client decided not to pursue the matter and requested the matter be taken off calendar, which the court granted.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR#11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Obi.

Petition By Trust Beneficiaries R. Madison Ahd G.R. Madison For Accounting, For Surcharge Of Trustees, And For Removal Of Trustees.
Off Calendar Apr-02-2008 Continued To May-14-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- ATTY. AMANDA LOUISE EBEY APPEARING FOR THE PETITIONERS;
CHESTER MADISON APPEARING IN PRO PER.

THE COURT INFORMED THE PARTIES THAT A JOINDER BY CO-PETITIONER, GLADYS R. MADISON SHOULD BE FILED. THERE IS ALSO A NEED FOR AN ISSUANCE OF A PROBATE SUMMONS THAT MUST BE PERSONALLY SERVED ON THE RESPONDENT. MR. MADISON ALSO INFORMED THE COURT OF HIS INTENTION TO GET AN ATTORNEY. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER TO MAY 14, 2008. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR# 7782. Clerk: Cynthia Herbert/ S. Ravinantapricha. Bailiff: J. Garrido.
